title: Late Checkout Procedure for Hotels in Egypt
trigger: Guest requests a late checkout beyond the standard checkout time.

steps.title: Receive Late Checkout Request
steps.action: Front desk staff receives a late checkout request from the guest either via phone, in-person, or through the PMS.

steps.title: Confirm Late Checkout Availability
steps.action: Check the PMS for room availability and occupancy rate to determine if a late checkout can be accommodated.

steps.title: Inform Guest of Unavailability
steps.action: Politely inform the guest that a late checkout cannot be accommodated due to full occupancy and offer alternatives such as luggage storage or use of hotel facilities.

steps.title: Process Late Checkout
steps.action: Update the PMS to reflect the new checkout time and inform housekeeping of the adjusted schedule. Apply any additional charges to the guest's account as per hotel policy.

steps.title: Confirm with Guest
steps.action: Contact the guest to confirm the late checkout approval and inform them of any additional charges incurred.

description: This playbook outlines the procedure for handling late checkout requests in hotels operating in Egypt, ensuring guest satisfaction while optimizing room availability and revenue.
escalation_path: Escalate to the Front Desk Manager if the guest is dissatisfied with the late checkout decision.
